title: Bartoline 1876 Ready to Use All Purpose Filler 1kg – Professional Quality for Plaster, Wood, Brick, and Stone– Easy to Apply & Sand
features: VERSATILE USE: Bartoline 1876 Ready to Use All Purpose Filler is perfect for repairs on a variety of surfaces including plaster, plasterboard, wood, brick, and stone.
EASY TO APPLY: The slump-resistant formula ensures smooth and easy application with a filling knife or trowel, filling cavities up to 10mm in depth.
DURABLE & RELIABLE: Can take wall plugs, nails, and screws when set, making it ideal for both interior and exterior use.
SMOOTH FINISH: Sands easily to a fine finish, won’t flash or grin under paint, and dries white, providing a clean, professional result.
WEATHER-RESISTANT: For outdoor use, protects against moisture and rain until set, ensuring long-lasting repairs that stand up to the elements.
description: Bartoline 1876 Ready To Use All Purpose Filler is high quality ready to use filler developed for the professional user. Its slump resistant formulation is ideal for repairs to plaster, plasterboard, brick, wood, stone, etc. Easy to use and sand down, dries white. suitable for interior and exterior use and capable of taking wall plugs, nails and screws when set, 1876 The Professional Range Ready To Use All Purpose Filler is easy sanded and will not flash or grin when overcoated.
